notes: [backfill:ccp1161.2] CCP 1161.2 unavailability notice backfilled for this unlawful detainer (CUD) case per owner confirmation; the 2026-05-26 capture recorded the case as unavailable but did not preserve the red-text notice. Recent CUD filings carry this standard CCP 1161.2 masking notice.
